category_sources: source_facts.description says TeslaMate is a self-hosted data logger for Tesla; official README describes a self-hosted Tesla data logger with Postgres, Grafana, and MQTT.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is teslamate; official repository and docs use TeslaMate branding.
docs_sources: Official repository README explicitly lists https://docs.teslamate.org as the official documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/teslamate-org/teslamate, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe Tesla data logging, self-hosting, Grafana visualization, Postgres storage, and MQTT publishing.
